score.hp: Increase the Animon's Maximum HP by 5
score.damage: Increase the Animon's Damage score by 2
score.dodge: Increase the Animon's Dodge score by 1
score.sig_init: Increase the Animon's Inititiative score and Signature Attack uses by 1

minor.talent: Increase the rank of a single talent by 1 (Up to a maximum of 3)
minor.quality: Increase the rank of a single quality by 1 (Up to a maximum of 3)

major.talent: Gain a new Talent at Rank 1 (perhaps something the Kid might have learned in the story so far).
major.quality: Gain a new Quality at Rank 1, at BASIC Stage or higher, as long as the Stage is available (each Animon Stage can have 2 Qualities, which apply at that Stage and all higher Stages).
major.effect: Gain a new Effect on any Signature Attack (each Signature Attack can have up to 3 Effects).
major.signature: Increase the Rank of a BASIC or SUPER Stage Signature Attack by 1 (up to a maximum Rank of 3).

bond.missing_kid: Drag a kid to this sheet to fill out bond information

quality.title: QUALITIES
quality.add: Add a new quality for this form

type.title: KID TYPE
type.placeholder: Put your kid type feature here

logic.name: LOGIC
logic.description: This Trait is best applied to devising solutions based on careful planning, strategy, and knowledge. Kids with high Logic scores are typically smart and well-prepared.
logic.usage: Logic would be used for Tests related to using unfamiliar technology, identifying important information, solving puzzles or riddles, putting together clues, and other things based on reasoning and understanding.

reflex.name: REFLEX
reflex.description: This Trait is best applied to using physical aptitude, staying sharp, and responding quickly to the unexpected. Kids with high Reflex scores are typically keen and physically fit.
reflex.usage: Reflex would be used for Tests related to most physical challenges like running, jumping, sneaking, and climbing, as well as sensing danger, spotting something hidden, and other things based on instincts and coordination.

spirit.name: SPIRIT
spirit.description: This Trait is best applied to bolstering determination and using strength of character to persuade or influence others. Kids with high Spirit scores are typically confident and resolute.
spirit.usage: Spirit would be used for Tests related to facing fears, forging ahead through dire circumstances, making friends, being persuasive, leading others, and other things based on moxie and willpower.
